calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Fernando Matias was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Lucia Rivas was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Shanay Nashelly FeryMat.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Fernando Matias was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Lucia Rivas was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires more information from petitioner in order to proceed with the proposed name change. Good cause appearing, the matter is CONTINUED to March 30, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Reset To Mar-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
